servinfo.title: Precautions for Emergency Flat Tire Repair Kit (If Equipped)

attention1.ptxt: Flat tire repair sealant included in Emergency Tire Repair Kit is harmful. Be sure to observe the following precautions to prevent your health from being ruined.

item.ptxt: Should you swallow sealant, get medical attention immediately.
Keep sealant out of reach of children.
Select place with good ventilation for handling sealant.
If sealant contacts your eye or skin, wash affected part thoroughly with water.
If anything abnormal still remains, get medical attention immediately.
Do not discard tire containing sealant as it is. Make sure to remove sealant from tire.
Dispose of sealant and shop cloth soiled with sealant as an industrial waste like waste oil.
When repairing tire repaired using Emergency Flat Tire Repair Kit, remove flat tire repair sealant from tire and replace the repaired tire with a new tire.
Sealant expiration date is printed on the container label. If it expires, sealant should be replaced with a new one to ensure emergency flat tire repair.
